name: spawriter
description: spawriter monorepo: Chrome extension + MCP server

scripts.setup: npm install && npm run build:ext && npm run build:mcp
scripts.build: npm run build:ext && npm run build:mcp
scripts.release: npm run build && node scripts/package-release.js && npm run clean:artifacts
scripts.mcp:serve: npm run mcp:build && node mcp/dist/cli.js serve
scripts.mcp:relay: npm run mcp:build && node mcp/dist/cli.js relay
scripts.test: npx tsx --test mcp/src/mcp.test.ts mcp/src/pw-executor.test.ts mcp/src/lease.test.ts mcp/src/utils.test.ts mcp/src/cli.test.ts mcp/src/relay.test.ts
scripts.deploy:firefox: npm run -w spawriter-ext webpack-build && npm run -w spawriter-ext lint && shipit firefox ext/
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:firefox && npm run deploy:chrome

author: LeonBuild
